Notes: UWO wins for the 11th time in 12 games...UWO defeated UWP by a 71-57 score on
Dce. 15...UWO gets 16 points and five rebounds from Wenig...UWP gets 15 points
and six rebounds from Carmody...UWO makes 19-of-23 free throws, while UWP
misses all five attempts...UWO goes on 13-2 scoring run to take 49-39 lead.
Game.Officials: M.J. Wagenson,  Jared Butson,  Ralph Sirmons
